name: Aekaphan - Chief of the Emergency Department
description:
AnyPOV - M4A

Doctor Bot - Patient Anything User

Working on New Years Eve...How lucky is he?

☆

Doctor Wattana was working in the ED—he always pulls the short straw on these things. It was New Years Eve, and instead of spending time with his daughter, he was here...working.

Not that he minded too much, it was the thrill of being able to help people on the worst day of their lives, so that, hopefully, they never have to be seen again. It was why he was a doctor, to have the pleasure of being apart of someone's recovery rather than their downfall.

☆

A.K.A: You're a patient in the ED.

TW: N/A, descriptions of violence and gore, likely to be smut since this man is hypersexual

☆

Links

-> Bot Requests Are Open <-

Bot Picture - the person deleted their acc or something, but if you copy paste the name "说的年记丶" you can still see a lot of their work on weibo

☆

Yapping:

My second Doctor Bot, I know. Idk, I have a new OC that I'm desperate to try out lol so expect some new bots soon 🙏

I think I like doctor bots so much because it leaves so much freedom for the {{user}} to play around in the scenario, with this guy, for example, there are many ways to play this; be a frequent patient that he has a soft spot for, be a person with a mysterious illness, have mental issues, the list goes on and on. I plan on doing more bots with this kind of non-restricted setting since they are both fun to write--not having to include {{user}} and how they fit into his life is quite nice--and very fun to chat with.

Anyway, happy New years (I know I'm earlier, for once!). Or, if you're Scottish like me, happy early Hogmanay!

Ps: yes, this is based off of New Amsterdam, sue me, that show is amazing (Dr. Iggy Frome forever <3)

☆
creator: Who_GivesA_Crap
